notes: IFS 1.0.15 - whole station standardized to 9600 8N1. The Opta USB console is now 9600 (was 115200) to match the display; the app connects, auto-connects and heals ALL serial devices (Opta + display) at 9600, and firmware SERVO_BAUD is 9600 too (set your A6 servo drive to 9600). Opta firmware ships in this build - reflash from the Firmware tab, then reset the Opta. Signed (Augeas Technologies).
